rules.name: Grain uniqueness: unitid x cipcode x credlev
rules.sql: SELECT unitid, cipcode, credlev, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM bronze.college_scorecard GROUP BY unitid, cipcode, credlev HAVING cnt > 1
rules.description: The declared grain is unitid x cipcode x credlev. Any duplicate combination indicates an ingestor dedup failure. EDA confirmed 0 duplicates across 69,947 rows.
rules.evidence: EDA: 'No duplicate grains exist. All 69,947 rows have unique unitid x cipcode x credlev combinations.' Threshold: 0 violations (100% unique).

rules.name: unitid not null
rules.sql: SELECT * FROM bronze.college_scorecard WHERE unitid IS NULL
rules.description: unitid is a required grain field. Must be present in every row. EDA shows 0% null rate across 69,947 rows.
rules.evidence: EDA: 'Null Rate: 0.000% (0 of 69,947 rows) -- required grain field.' Threshold: 0 violations.

rules.name: cipcode not null
rules.sql: SELECT * FROM bronze.college_scorecard WHERE cipcode IS NULL
rules.description: cipcode is a required grain field. Must be present in every row. EDA shows 0% null rate across 69,947 rows.
rules.evidence: EDA: 'Null Rate: 0.000% (0 of 69,947 rows) -- required grain field.' Threshold: 0 violations.

rules.name: credlev not null
rules.sql: SELECT * FROM bronze.college_scorecard WHERE credlev IS NULL
rules.description: credlev is a required grain field. Must be present in every row. EDA shows 0% null rate across 69,947 rows.
rules.evidence: EDA: 'Null Rate: 0.000% (0 of 69,947 rows) -- required grain field.' Threshold: 0 violations.

rules.name: instnm not null
rules.sql: SELECT * FROM bronze.college_scorecard WHERE instnm IS NULL
rules.description: Institution name should be present for every row. EDA shows 0% null rate. Every institution has a name.
rules.evidence: EDA: 'Null Rate: 0.000% (0 of 69,947 rows).' Domain context confirms every IPEDS institution has a name. Threshold: 0 violations.

rules.name: earn_mdn_hi_1yr null rate within expected range
rules.sql: SELECT * FROM bronze.college_scorecard WHERE earn_mdn_hi_1yr IS NULL
rules.description: Earnings 1yr field is expected to be ~64% null due to Department of Education privacy suppression. Threshold set at 70% of total rows (48,963 of 69,947) to allow headroom for variation across data refreshes. Exceeding this threshold may indicate a source change or ingestor issue.
rules.evidence: EDA: 'Null Rate: 63.978% (44,751 of 69,947 rows).' EDA recommendation: 'Set null threshold at 70%.' 70% of 69,947 = 48,963.

rules.name: earn_mdn_hi_2yr null rate within expected range
rules.sql: SELECT * FROM bronze.college_scorecard WHERE earn_mdn_hi_2yr IS NULL
rules.description: Earnings 2yr field is expected to be ~60% null due to privacy suppression. Threshold set at 65% of total rows (45,466 of 69,947). The 2yr field has slightly lower null rate than 1yr per EDA.
rules.evidence: EDA: 'Null Rate: 60.426% (42,266 of 69,947 rows).' EDA recommendation: 'Set null threshold at 65%.' 65% of 69,947 = 45,466.

rules.name: debt_all_stgp_eval_mdn null rate within expected range
rules.sql: SELECT * FROM bronze.college_scorecard WHERE debt_all_stgp_eval_mdn IS NULL
rules.description: Debt field is expected to be ~63% null due to privacy suppression. Threshold set at 68% of total rows (47,564 of 69,947).
rules.evidence: EDA: 'Null Rate: 63.102% (44,138 of 69,947 rows).' EDA recommendation: 'Set null threshold at 68%.' 68% of 69,947 = 47,564.

rules.name: ipedscount1 null rate within expected range
rules.sql: SELECT * FROM bronze.college_scorecard WHERE ipedscount1 IS NULL
rules.description: IPEDS completions count should be present for most rows. EDA shows 8.7% null. Threshold set at 12% (8,394 of 69,947) per EDA recommendation.
rules.evidence: EDA: 'Null Rate: 8.718% (6,098 of 69,947 rows).' EDA recommendation: 'Set null threshold at 12%.' 12% of 69,947 = 8,394.

rules.name: credlev equals 3 for all rows
rules.description: MVP filter requires CREDLEV=3 (bachelor's degree only). Any non-3 value indicates the ingestor filter failed. This is a hard structural constraint.
rules.evidence: EDA: 'credlev -- Cardinality: 1 distinct value. Distribution: 3 = 69,947 (100%).' Domain context: 'CREDLEV must equal 3. Any non-3 value indicates an ingestor filter failure.' Threshold: 0 violations.

rules.name: cipcode format: 4-digit numeric string
rules.sql: SELECT * FROM bronze.college_scorecard WHERE NOT regexp_matches(cipcode, '^\d{4}$')
rules.description: All CIP codes in the source are 4-character numeric strings (e.g., '5202'). This is the expected bronze zone format; silver zone will transform to XX.XXXX. Any deviation indicates a parsing or type-coercion issue.
rules.evidence: EDA: 'All values are exactly 4 characters long. Format is NNNN (digits only, no dot separator).' Domain context: 'CIP code must be a valid 4-digit string.' Threshold: 0 violations across 69,947 rows.

rules.name: earn_mdn_hi_1yr range check
rules.sql: SELECT * FROM bronze.college_scorecard WHERE earn_mdn_hi_1yr IS NOT NULL AND (earn_mdn_hi_1yr <= 0 OR earn_mdn_hi_1yr > 300000)
rules.description: When present, median earnings (1yr) must be positive and within a plausible range. The $300k upper bound provides generous headroom above the observed max of $161,723. Values <= 0 are domain-impossible (earnings of employed graduates).
rules.evidence: EDA: 'Min: $4,880, Max: $161,723.' Domain context: 'Earnings values must be positive when present.' EDA recommendation: 'Min $1,000, Max $250,000.' Threshold set with additional headroom at $300k to avoid false positives from elite program drift.

rules.name: earn_mdn_hi_2yr range check
rules.sql: SELECT * FROM bronze.college_scorecard WHERE earn_mdn_hi_2yr IS NOT NULL AND (earn_mdn_hi_2yr <= 0 OR earn_mdn_hi_2yr > 300000)
rules.description: When present, median earnings (2yr) must be positive and within a plausible range. Same logic as 1yr rule.
rules.evidence: EDA: 'Min: $5,938, Max: $160,116.' Domain context: 'Earnings values must be positive when present.' Threshold: 0 violations outside $0-$300k range.

rules.name: debt_all_stgp_eval_mdn range check
rules.sql: SELECT * FROM bronze.college_scorecard WHERE debt_all_stgp_eval_mdn IS NOT NULL AND (debt_all_stgp_eval_mdn <= 0 OR debt_all_stgp_eval_mdn > 200000)
rules.description: When present, median debt must be positive and within a plausible range. The $200k upper bound provides generous headroom above the observed max of $57,500 to accommodate future data drift (e.g., graduate-professional programs if CREDLEV filter changes).
rules.evidence: EDA: 'Min: $2,750, Max: $57,500.' Domain context: 'Debt values must be positive when present.' Threshold: 0 violations outside $0-$200k range.

rules.name: unitid is a valid 6-digit positive integer
rules.sql: SELECT * FROM bronze.college_scorecard WHERE unitid < 100000 OR unitid > 999999
rules.description: IPEDS institution IDs are 6-digit integers in the range 100,000-999,999. Values outside this range indicate a data corruption or parsing issue.
rules.evidence: EDA: 'Min=100,654, Max=497,268. 6-digit IPEDS institutional identifiers. All values are positive integers.' Domain context: 'UNITID must be a 6-digit positive integer. IPEDS IDs are assigned in the 6-digit range (100,000-999,999).' Threshold: 0 violations.

rules.name: Row count within expected range
rules.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN cnt < 50000 OR cnt > 100000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS violation FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM bronze.college_scorecard)
rules.description: Total row count should be between 50,000 and 100,000. Current count is 69,947. The range allows ~30% variation for annual data changes (institution openings/closures, program additions/removals). A count outside this range suggests a source format change, download failure, or filter error.
rules.evidence: EDA: 'Record Count: 69,947.' EDA recommendation: 'Total row count: 60,000-80,000.' Widened to 50k-100k for robustness across annual refreshes while still catching catastrophic failures.

rules.name: load_date within last 30 days
rules.sql: SELECT * FROM bronze.college_scorecard WHERE load_date < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30' DAY LIMIT 1
rules.description: The load_date should be recent (within 30 days of query execution). Stale data suggests the pipeline has not been refreshed. Returns at most 1 row as a sentinel check.
rules.evidence: EDA: 'load_date -- Cardinality: 1 distinct value: 2026-04-06.' All rows share the same load_date from the single batch load. If this date falls more than 30 days in the past, the data is stale.

rules.name: Earnings 2yr vs 1yr consistency (soft check)
rules.sql: SELECT * FROM bronze.college_scorecard WHERE earn_mdn_hi_1yr IS NOT NULL AND earn_mdn_hi_2yr IS NOT NULL AND earn_mdn_hi_2yr < earn_mdn_hi_1yr
rules.description: When both earnings fields are present, 2yr earnings may be less than 1yr earnings because these are different cohort measurement windows, NOT longitudinal tracking of the same individuals. EDA shows 44.2% of dual-present rows exhibit this pattern. This rule monitors the rate but allows a high threshold. A dramatic increase could indicate a data processing change.
rules.evidence: EDA: '44.2% of rows where both earnings fields are present show 2-year earnings below 1-year earnings.' Domain context: 'Do NOT write a rule that flags 2yr < 1yr as an anomaly.' 44.2% of ~25,196 dual-present rows = ~11,137 rows. Threshold set at 12,000 to allow headroom. This is a monitoring rule, not a rejection rule.
